properties.summary: A perennial shrub with small narrow leaves and yellow flowers growing up to ~1.5 meters. The drug is known under many different names. The drug been used for shamanic purposes by indigenous people in Central America and Mexico. The drug is reported to be mainly auditory based.
properties.warning: There are a series of anecdotal reports that report users after smoking this compound having reported to have fairly negative side-effects such as night fevers, night sweats, and muscle pains.
